report.summary: Community growth cycle v12 (Mar 24 evening): Drafted 4 new tweets (#102-105) covering Nasdaq tokenized equities approval, MicroStrategy 762K BTC accumulation, March institutional scorecard thread (4 parts), and $304B stablecoin ATH; added newsletter v21 addendum and Discord/TG evening update; created 2 branded SVG social cards (Nasdaq tokenized equities with feature cards + flow diagram, MicroStrategy 762K BTC with accumulation timeline bar); content calendar v26 extends through Mar 28 with 8 additional scheduled posts.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #102: Nasdaq tokenized equities approval — 24/7 trading, T+0 settlement, fractional shares, global access without US brokerage. CTA to RWA guide. Schedule: Wed Mar 25 9AM ET
Tweet #103: MicroStrategy 762,099 BTC — bought 1,031 BTC at $74,326, $57.69B total holdings, more BTC than any country except US. CTA to whale tracker. Schedule: Wed Mar 25 1PM ET

Tweet #104: March 2026 Institutional Scorecard Thread (4 parts) — $2.5B ETF inflows, MicroStrategy, BlackRock ETHB, ParaFi $125M, Nasdaq tokenized equities, Solana SDP, $304B stablecoins, SEC framework. Schedule: Thu Mar 26 10AM ET
Tweet #105: $304B stablecoin supply ATH — capital parking in stables not leaving, Solana $15.7B ATH, Mastercard building, 40%+ YoY settlement growth. Schedule: Wed Mar 25 5PM ET
Newsletter v21 addendum: Nasdaq tokenized equities + MicroStrategy 762K BTC updates for Thu Mar 27 digest
Discord/TG evening announcement: Nasdaq approval, MicroStrategy purchase, ParaFi fund, content calendar for rest of week
Content calendar v26: 8 new posts scheduled Wed Mar 25 – Fri Mar 28 across Twitter, Discord/TG, and Email

sections.title: Market Intelligence
items: BTC: $71,043 (+3.79%) — relief rally from $68,302 support, $128B ETF AUM, $2.5B March inflows
ETH: $2,166 (+5.16%) — BlackRock ETHB staked ETF +20% since Mar 12 launch
SOL: ~$90 (+6.48%) — SDP launched with Mastercard, Western Union, Worldpay
Fear & Greed: 8–11 — Day 46–47 consecutive Extreme Fear
MicroStrategy: bought 1,031 BTC at $74,326 avg — 762,099 BTC total ($57.69B)
Nasdaq: approved for tokenized equities trading — historic first for major exchange
ParaFi: raised $125M crypto infrastructure venture fund
Stablecoins: $304B ATH supply; Solana stablecoin supply $15.7B ATH
BTC ETFs: $2.5B March inflows, YTD outflows shrunk to $210M from flipping positive
SEC: first formal crypto securities classification framework published
Trump: 5-day pause on Iran strikes amid ceasefire talks — eased geopolitical pressure
degen0x: 740 published pages, 2 in queue (SDP guide, Agentic Payments guide)
